chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ الْغُلَامِ وَ الْجَارِيَةِ يُزَوَّجَانِ وَ هُمَا غَيْرُ مُدْرِكَيْنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Inheritance of the boy and the girl both married (arranged) and they both had not matured yet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/196)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/196)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الصَّبِيِّ يُزَوَّجُ الصَّبِيَّةَ هَلْ يَتَوَارَثَانِ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ أَبَوَاهُمَا [هُمَا] اللَّذَانِ زَوَّجَاهُمَا فَنَعَمْ قُلْتُ أَ يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُ الْأَبِ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazal, from Al Qasim Bin Urwa, from Ibn Bakeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,

The narrator says: ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the young boy who marries the young girl (both immature), would they both be inheriting?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If their fathers who were the ones who arranged their marriage, then yes’. I said, ‘Is the divorce by the father permissible?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Urwah from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a child who marries a female child; if they inherit each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘If their fathers are the ones who have arranged their marriage then they inherit.’ I then asked, ‘Is their divorce by father permissible?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘No, it is not permissible.’”
